'''âk-h-b''' ('''kakahab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yak|yak]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-h-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yak|yak]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-h-b
|-
! Lemma
| kakahab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikahab|thikahab]] || [[word:jikahab|jikahab]] || [[word:shikahab|shikahab]] || [[word:kikahab|kikahab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukahab|thuthukahab]] || [[word:jujukahab|jujukahab]] || [[word:shushukahab|shushukahab]] || [[word:kukukahab|kukukahab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukahab|thukahab]] || [[word:jukahab|jukahab]] || [[word:shukahab|shukahab]] || [[word:kukahab|kukahab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukahab|thukahab]] || [[word:jukahab|jukahab]] || [[word:shukahab|shukahab]] || [[word:kukahab|kukahab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekahab|thekahab]] || [[word:jekahab|jekahab]] || [[word:shekahab|shekahab]] || [[word:kekahab|kekahab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokahab|thothokahab]] || [[word:jojokahab|jojokahab]] || [[word:shoshokahab|shoshokahab]] || [[word:kokokahab|kokokahab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokahab|thokahab]] || [[word:jokahab|jokahab]] || [[word:shokahab|shokahab]] || [[word:kokahab|kokahab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokahab|thokahab]] || [[word:jokahab|jokahab]] || [[word:shokahab|shokahab]] || [[word:kokahab|kokahab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚkahab|thĂŚkahab]] || [[word:jĂŚkahab|jĂŚkahab]] || [[word:shĂŚkahab|shĂŚkahab]] || [[word:kĂŚkahab|kĂŚkahab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakahab|thathakahab]] || [[word:jajakahab|jajakahab]] || [[word:shashakahab|shashakahab]] || [[word:kakakahab|kakakahab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakahab|thakahab]] || [[word:jakahab|jakahab]] || [[word:shakahab|shakahab]] || [[word:kakahab|kakahab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakahab|thakahab]] || [[word:jakahab|jakahab]] || [[word:shakahab|shakahab]] || [[word:kakahab|kakahab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakahab|shakahab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakahab|goshakahab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakahab|gokishakahab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakahabnĂź|shakahabnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakahabnknĂź|goshakahabnknĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakahabnĂź|gokishakahabnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakahabshĂŤ|shakahabshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakahabnkshĂŤ|goshakahabnkshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakahabshĂŤ|gokishakahabshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakahabro|shakahabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakahabnkro|goshakahabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakahabro|gokishakahabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakahabmu|shakahabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakahabnkmu|goshakahabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakahabmu|gokishakahabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakahabsher|shakahabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakahabnksher|goshakahabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakahabsher|gokishakahabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakahabng|shakahabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakahabnkng|goshakahabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakahabng|gokishakahabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakahabya|shakahabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakahabnkya|goshakahabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakahabya|gokishakahabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakahabyam|shakahabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakahabnkyam|goshakahabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakahabyam|gokishakahabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakahabnĂźshĂŤ|shakahabnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakahabnknĂźshĂŤ|goshakahabnknĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakahabnĂźshĂŤ|gokishakahabnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakahabnĂźro|shakahabnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakahabnknĂźro|goshakahabnknĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakahabnĂźro|gokishakahabnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakahabnĂźmu|shakahabnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakahabnknĂźmu|goshakahabnknĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakahabnĂźmu|gokishakahabnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakahabshĂŤnĂź|shakahabshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakahabnkshĂŤnĂź|goshakahabnkshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakahabshĂŤnĂź|gokishakahabshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakahabshĂŤro|shakahabshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakahabnkshĂŤro|goshakahabnkshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakahabshĂŤro|gokishakahabshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakahabshĂŤmu|shakahabshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakahabnkshĂŤmu|goshakahabnkshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakahabshĂŤmu|gokishakahabshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakahabronĂź|shakahabronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakahabnkronĂź|goshakahabnkronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakahabronĂź|gokishakahabronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakahabroshĂŤ|shakahabroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakahabnkroshĂŤ|goshakahabnkroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakahabroshĂŤ|gokishakahabroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakahabromu|shakahabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakahabnkromu|goshakahabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakahabromu|gokishakahabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakahabmunĂź|shakahabmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakahabnkmunĂź|goshakahabnkmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakahabmunĂź|gokishakahabmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakahabmushĂŤ|shakahabmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakahabnkmushĂŤ|goshakahabnkmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakahabmushĂŤ|gokishakahabmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakahabmuro|shakahabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakahabnkmuro|goshakahabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakahabmuro|gokishakahabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
